question: Which papers report both a qualitative data type and a machine learning metric of accuracy?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype .
  ?dtype rdfs:label ?dtypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dtypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P57016 ?ml .
  ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric .
  ?metric orkgp:P18048 ?acc .
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel

}

  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .

question: Which papers were published in the IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference and report a research question type?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueLabel)) = LCASE('IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference'))
  ?contribution orkgp:P37330 ?rq .
  ?rq orkgp:P41928 ?rqType .
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel

SELECT DISTINCT ?methodName WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype .
  ?dtype rdfs:label ?dtypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dtypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?methodName .
}
ORDER BY ?methodName

question: What labels are reported for the threat categories mentioned in papers with threats to validity?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?threatLabel WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .
  ?threats ?threatPred ?threatNode .
  VALUES ?threatPred { orkgp:P55037 orkgp:P55035 orkgp:P55034 orkgp:P55036 orkgp:P59109 orkgp:P60006 orkgp:P97002 orkgp:P68005 orkgp:P97000 orkgp:P97001 orkgp:P145000 }
  ?threatNode rdfs:label ?threatLabel .
}
ORDER BY ?threatLabel

question: What labels are reported for venue series in papers that also report inferential statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?venueLabel WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inferentialStatistics .
  ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel .
}
ORDER BY ?venueLabel

question: What labels are reported for the data types in papers that report a research data entry?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?dataTypeLabel WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dataType .
  ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel .
}
ORDER BY ?dataTypeLabel

question: How many papers report both qualitative data and inferential statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype .
  ?dtype rdfs:label ?dtypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dtypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf .
}

question: In which years were papers published that report qualitative data and a data collection method name?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype .
  ?dtype rdfs:label ?dtypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dtypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?methodName .
}
ORDER BY ?year
